name: Scalloped Potatoes (Hess)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Peel potatoes and slice crosswise into 1/8-inch slices. If using large potatoes, cut slices in half.
4. Mix together flour, salt, and pepper.
5. Place half of the potatoes in the prepared casserole dish. Dot with half the margarine, sprinkle half the seasoned flour on top, then half the onion.
6. Repeat with remaining potatoes, margarine, seasoned flour, and onion.
7. Pour enough hot water into one corner so that it barely covers the potatoes.
8. Cover and bake for 50 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake for another 25-30 minutes or until potatoes are browned and tender.
10. Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 17g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 5g; CAL 117
For low-sodium diets, omit salt. Use unsalted margarine.
